message:
test(fcp-core): pin registry-acceptance verdict enum matrix (flywheel_connectors-zncpi)

Bead asks for RegistryAcceptance variants + Display per documented
contract. fcp-core has no type literally named RegistryAcceptance;
the verdict-shaped surface that decides whether registry artifacts /
resume attempts / policy previews are accepted splits across:
- VerificationDecision (supply_chain.rs:926) — primary registry-
  acceptance verdict, Allow / Deny on a verified artifact
- VerificationReasonCode — SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE reason classifier
- ResumeDisposition (connector_state.rs:1126) — 4-variant disposition
  with documented .label() Display analogue
- ResumeOutcome (connector_state.rs:1153) — past-tense final verdict
- PolicyPreviewDecision (policy.rs:1869) — 3-variant preview verdict

Coverage:
- VerificationDecision JSON + CBOR round-trip per variant, count = 2,
  PascalCase + unknown rejection
- VerificationReasonCode SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE format pinned for 5
  representative variants; lower snake_case rejected (case
  convention is part of the wire contract)
- ResumeDisposition .label() pinned per variant + agrees with serde
  snake_case tag byte-for-byte; JSON+CBOR round-trip; PascalCase
  rejection; pairwise distinctness
- ResumeOutcome JSON form + round-trip per variant; lexical
  distinction pinned: ResumeOutcome is past tense (final verdict),
  ResumeDisposition is imperative verb (chosen action)
- PolicyPreviewDecision JSON form + round-trip per variant;
  RequireApproval uses underscore not hyphen
- Cross-enum: `deny` and `allow` tokens consistent across
  acceptance enums; ResumeDisposition lacks `allow` (uses `attach` /
  `retry` instead) — pinned absence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
